Petition For Order Directing Personal Representative To Convey Property [Prob. Code 850(A)(2)(C)]
Off Calendar Jan-05-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ross Madden for Norman Kvalvik (Petitioner).

Mr. Madden stated that he is not aware of any objections, that he sent notice to everybody, that he received a request on December 10th to send two notices to different addresses and that he has already done so. The Court granted the Petition for Order Directing Personal Representative to Convey Property (subject to review of the revised order).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported.
